text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) The reason Iranians are negotiating is because they’ve sustained a lot of damage. They want to monetize the Strait of Hormuz and be able to sell their oil. They trust the leverage they have over Hormuz - not the Americans. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：伊朗人之所以进行谈判，是因为他们遭受了巨大的损失。他们希望将霍尔木兹海峡货币化并能够出售石油。他们相信自己对霍尔木兹海峡的控制力，而不是相信美国人。完整采访

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese political figures opposed to Hezbollah are calling on the Beirut government to open peace negotiations with Israel, according to the Lebanese newspaper Nidaa al-Watan. The officials called for a small negotiating delegation free from sectarian constraints, a unilateral ceasefire declaration to Hezbollah with a short timeline for disarmament, and outreach to Arab states and the Vatican to build diplomatic support. A Lebanese official told the paper the government is the only body authorized to negotiate with Israel and said Lebanon should "copy the Pakistani model", demand a limited ceasefire and begin talks immediately after it takes effect. The paper also reports that negotiations between U.S., Israeli, and Lebanese ambassadors will begin Tuesday in Washington, with follow-up talks expected in Cyprus. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据黎巴嫩《祖国报》报道，反对真主党的黎巴嫩政治人物呼吁贝鲁特政府与以色列开启和平谈判。官员们呼吁组建一个不受宗派限制的小型谈判代表团，向真主党宣布单方面停火并设定短期裁军时间表，并与阿拉伯国家和梵蒂冈接触以建立外交支持。一位黎巴嫩官员告诉该报，政府是唯一有权与以色列谈判的机构，并表示黎巴嫩应该“复制巴基斯坦模式”，要求有限停火并在停火生效后立即开始会谈。该报还报道称，美国、以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的谈判将于周二在华盛顿开始，后续会谈预计将在塞浦路斯举行。推文

text: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ Saudi Regime Executes Citizen Over Childhood Protest Charges The Saudi regime executed Ali Hassan al-Subaiti on April 9, 2026, on fabricated “terrorism” charges dating back to when he was only 12 years old in the 2011-2012 Qatif protests. Arrested in 2017 at the age of 18 while seeking a driver’s license, he suffered 8.5 years of detention, torture, solitary confinement, and denial of legal defense. Saudi claims of joining a foreign terrorist group came with zero public proof - no documents, videos, or evidence of any kind. Rights groups say it relied only on tortured confessions from peaceful childhood protests. This is the 9th political execution in 2026 - just 8 days after Saud al-Faraj. At least 52 more remain at risk.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ 沙特政权因童年抗议指控处决公民：沙特政权于 2026 年 4 月 9 日处决了阿里·哈桑·阿尔-苏拜蒂，罪名是捏造的“恐怖主义”指控，这些指控可追溯到他在 2011-2012 年卡提夫抗议活动中仅 12 岁时。他于 2017 年 18 岁时在申请驾照时被捕，遭受了 8.5 年的拘留、酷刑、单独监禁和剥夺法律辩护权。沙特声称他加入了外国恐怖组织，但没有任何公开证据——没有任何文件、视频或任何形式的证据。人权组织表示，这仅仅依赖于他在童年和平抗议中遭受酷刑后的供词。这是 2026 年的第 9 次政治处决——距离沙特·阿尔-法拉杰被处决仅 8 天。至少还有 52 人面临风险。

text: With the clear failure of the Israeli attacks on Beirut to kill a single Hezbollah commander or to damage even 1% of Hezbullah's war efforts With the failure to kill even a cultural or a political official, the Israelis now want to justify that the attack in Beirut was to protect the Lebanese government from a Hezbullah coup Bro you don't even know Lebanon if you assume a coup is possible. You are murderers and coping by claiming a fake story about a coup https://x.com/i/status/2042629506192523509
text_zh: 鉴于以色列对贝鲁特的袭击明显未能杀死一名真主党指挥官，也未能破坏真主党 1% 的战争努力，鉴于未能杀死哪怕一名文化或政治官员，以色列人现在想辩解说，对贝鲁特的袭击是为了保护黎巴嫩政府免受真主党政变的影响。兄弟，如果你认为政变是可能的，那你根本不了解黎巴嫩。你们是杀人犯，通过编造关于政变的虚假故事来应对。 https://x.com/i/status/2042629506192523509

text: Who is the LA reporter for LA times in Beirut?
text_zh: 谁是《洛杉矶时报》驻贝鲁特的记者？

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 Yep, unhinged Trump: We’re loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them — and we will be using them very effectively. You’re dealing with people that we don’t know whether or not they tell the truth. To our face, they’re getting rid of all nuclear weapons… and then they go out to the press and say, ‘No, we’d like to enrich. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 是的，失控的特朗普：我们正在用最好的弹药、有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只。如果我们没有达成协议，我们将使用它们——而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。你面对的是一群我们不知道他们是否说真话的人。当着我们的面，他们说要销毁所有核武器……然后他们出去对媒体说，‘不，我们想浓缩铀。’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: South Korea proposed a $17 billion supplementary budget to cushion the economic impact of the Iran conflict and rising oil prices. It includes cash payments to the bottom 70% of earners (about 36 million people), ranging from $65–$400 per person to offset energy and inflation costs.
text_zh: 韩国提议 170 亿美元的补充预算，以缓冲伊朗冲突和油价上涨带来的经济影响。其中包括向收入最低的 70% 的人（约 3600 万人）发放每人 65 至 400 美元的现金，以抵消能源和通货膨胀成本。

text: The White House warned staff not to place well-timed bets on prediction or futures markets after suspicious trades occurred just before Trump paused Iran strikes. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 白宫警告员工不要在预测或期货市场上进行适时的押注，此前在特朗普暂停对伊朗打击之前发生了可疑交易。来源：华尔街日报

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced that they targeted a number of Israeli bulldozers that were working on demolishing houses in the town of Ayta al-Shaab with a rocket barrage in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，他们用火箭弹袭击了黎巴嫩南部艾塔阿尔沙布镇正在拆除房屋的几辆以色列推土机。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: You’re dealing with people that we don’t know whether or not they tell the truth. To our face, they’re getting rid of all nuclear weapons… and then they go out to the press and say, ‘No, we’d like to enrich.’ Source: NY Post
text_zh: 特朗普：你面对的是一群我们不知道他们是否说真话的人。当着我们的面，他们说要销毁所有核武器……然后他们出去对媒体说，‘不，我们想浓缩铀。’ 来源：《纽约邮报》

text: Trump: We’re loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them — and we will be using them very effectively. Source: NY Post
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在用最好的弹药、有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只。如果我们没有达成协议，我们将使用它们——而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。来源：《纽约邮报》
